title: NexusDB Decision Context Schema
description: Schema for the optional decision_context frontmatter block

why_created.description: One sentence explaining the trigger for this note's creation

decision.description: Key curation or scoping decision made about this note

assumptions.description: Beliefs assumed to be true at creation time

tradeoffs.description: What was deliberately omitted for atomicity or clarity

importance.description: How important this note is. Default: normal

context.description: Situational context at the time of creation

future_work.description: What would improve or complete this note
